name: netresearch-marketplace-site
description: GitHub Pages storytelling site for the Netresearch Claude Code Marketplace.

scripts.check: npm run check:categories && npm run check:orphans && npm run check:seo
scripts.prebuild: npm run check:categories && npm run og:generate
scripts.build:all: npm run fetch:readmes && npm run check && npm run build:once && npm run check:hreflang
